query:
SELECT i.id, i.invoice_number, i.subtotal_net, i.tax_amount, i.total_gross,
  (SELECT SUM(line_total_net) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id) as items_net,
  (SELECT SUM(line_tax) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id) as items_tax,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id) as item_count
FROM invoices i
WHERE i.invoice_number = 'AN-2026-1861';
